name: Lower Body Stretch
description: Targeted stretch routine for quads, hamstrings, hips, and calves. Great post-leg-day or as a standalone mobility session.

exercises.notes: Each side — keep legs straight, gentle reach
Each side — use wall for balance if needed
Each side — straight leg for gastroc, bent for soleus
Hinge from hips, keep back flat
Each side — use strap or towel if needed
Each side — square hips, fold forward
Lean back only as far as comfortable, hands behind for support
Each side — use wall or couch

tips: Hold each stretch and breathe deeply — don't bounce
Go to mild discomfort, never pain
Great after leg day or a long run
Do both sides for unilateral stretches
